newsletters.title: Spiral 4.0 Goes Agent-native
newsletters.content:
Write more like yourself wherever you work В вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊ

On Every

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL29uLWV2ZXJ5IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjF9


SPIRAL 4.0 GOES AGENT-NATIVE https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL29uLWV2ZXJ5L3NwaXJhbC00LTAtZ29lcy1hZ2VudC1uYXRpdmUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Mn0=


WRITE MORE LIKE YOURSELF WHEREVER YOU WORK https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL29uLWV2ZXJ5L3NwaXJhbC00LTAtZ29lcy1hZ2VudC1uYXRpdmUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6M30=

by Marcus Moretti https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BtYXJjdXNfZmQ4MzAyXzEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NH0=

Figma/Midjourney/Every illustration.

TL;DR: Spiral https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3dyaXRld2l0aHNwaXJhbC5jb20vIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjV9 v4 just shipped with four major updates: a style engine that generates writing indistinguishable from your own 87 percent of the time, agent-native access via MCP, CLI, and API, team workspaces for writing in a shared voice, and a $10 price drop, bringing personal plans to start at $15 a month. Spiral will continue to be free for paid Every subscribers https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3N1YnNjcmliZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo2fQ== along with access to all our tools and content.

Try Spiral 4.0 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3dyaXRld2l0aHNwaXJhbC5jb20vP3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0X2J1dHRvbiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo3fQ==



----------------------------------------



Today weвЂ™re announcing a number of updates to Spiral, the writing partner for you and your agent. Spiral is built by writers for writers, to help you from idea to line edit, matching your writing style throughout.

THE HIGHLIGHTS:

 * With stylometry https://every. (or the study of writing styles), Spiral now sounds more like you. WeвЂ™ve built a new Style Engine from the ground up, so Spiral computes your writing fingerprint and picks relevant samples for new drafts.
 * Use Spiral wherever you do work. With a new MCP, plus our existing CLI and API, Spiral can step in if youвЂ™re underwhelmed by your agentвЂ™s writing output, or need good writing in any workflow.
 * For teams, use Spiral to speak with one voice. Team workspaces let you share styles, prompts, knowledge, and now chats and drafts.
 * And finally, weвЂ™ve given Spiral a new coat of paint and logo, designed by Daniel Rodrigues https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BkYW5pZWxfNWZiZDIxXzEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OX0=. The primary brand font is now Edgar, from Frere-Jones Type.

Since re-launching https://every. at the end of last year, Spiral has:

 * Created 5,524 from 168,464 writing samples
 * Generated 113,165 drafts
 * Made 350,078 revisions

It also now averages a 4.9/5 conversation score on our internal LLM-as-judge eval.

We built Spiral to help people who write for work write better. Just as Cursor is a coding harness, Spiral is a writing harness, supporting you at every stage of the writing process. HereвЂ™s how:

 1. Before you start writing, Spiral vets the clarity of your idea and materials to substantiate it. From basic writing prompts to the hard-won insights from EveryвЂ™s editorial and social media teams, multiple 12,000-word system prompts govern SpiralвЂ™s workflow. (To get the style and substance just right, weвЂ™ve iterated on these system prompts 131 times so far.)
 2. When itвЂ™s time to draft, Spiral uses stylometry to reproduce your voice, working in EveryвЂ™s know-how where appropriate. For example, if you ask Spiral for tweets, it will incorporate best practices from XвЂ™s latest algorithm update.
 3. When you need help polishing a draft, Spiral is your editor. Along with a built-in guardrails against AI-speak, you can set custom writing rules that Spiral applies in a вЂњtop edit,вЂќ the final expert-level edit on a pieceвЂ”a term I learned working at Every.

WeвЂ™ve written about the challenges of getting LLMs to write like you https://every.. ItвЂ™s difficult to prompt an LLM to write like you, let alone get it to stop using common AI phrasing and punctuation. SpiralвЂ™s Style Engine is the best solution to this problem weвЂ™re aware of. An eval runs on every draft Spiral produces, challenging an LLM-as-judge to spot the generated draft among real samples in a blind lineup. Today weвЂ™re at 87 percent on this eval, meaning SpiralвЂ™s generated draft blends in with usersвЂ™ samples almost nine times out of 10. When a draft is spotted, the judge explains why, creating a feedback loop to refine the Style Engine further.

Try Spiral 4.0 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW50LW5hdGl2ZSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQyODgsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3dyaXRld2l0aHNwaXJhbC5jb20vP3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0X2J1dHRvbiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxMn0=


SPIRAL GOES AGENT-NATIVE

As Dan Shipper https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3BpcmFsIDQuMCBHb2VzIEFnZW

Caption: 



----------
==howdy, itвЂ™s Barsee again.==

==happy wednesday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.==

==**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**==

* NewLimit wants to test age-reversing medicine in humans

* OpenAI turns Codex into a website builder

* Microsoft unveils an always-on AI assistant

* Martin Scorsese backs AI startup for film storyboarding

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

LetвЂ™s _dive_ into the Valley of AIвЂ¦


----------

----------
#### **WISPR FLOW**

## [Everywhere workflow (one voice layer across tools)](https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d47f0421-1c14-4847-832c-689a4c2a7d92/Newsletters_Image_1920x1080__7___5_.png?t=1780496729)
Follow image link: (https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)
Caption: Courtesy: Wispr Flow

Flow is a voice layer that works anywhere you type. Use it to respond in Slack, write docs, craft emails, or prompt an AI assistant without switching tools or copy/pasting. It's the fastest way to get high-quality text into your workflow, whether you're drafting, editing, or ideating.

[**Try Flow Free**](https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

##### 1/ NewLimit wants to test age-reversing medicine in humans

Youtube: 2026 NewLimit intro (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OgbjycCpqTo)

[NewLimit](https://www.newlimit.com/), the anti-aging startup co-founded by Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong, has raised [$435 million in a Series C](https://blog.newlimit.com/p/newlimit-raises-435m-led-by-founders) led by Founders Fund. The company says it plans to begin its first human clinical trial next year after discovering a therapy that can reverse the biological age of old human liver cells. NewLimit is focused on "cell reprogramming," an emerging field that aims to restore aged cells to a more youthful state rather than treating diseases one by one. In early studies, the company's liver therapy improved recovery from injury, dietary stress, and alcohol-related damage. If successful in humans, it could mark one of the first real-world tests of whether aging itself can be treated as a medical condition.

##### 2/ OpenAI turns Codex into a website builder

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/cd12bd0e-f912-4bfc-bbd9-f0b9934f2914/sites-list-light__1_.png?t=1780495849)
Caption: 

OpenAI has expanded Codex beyond software development with a new feature called [Sites](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2061845949170045346?s=20), which lets users generate and publish websites and web apps directly from AI prompts. The company also introduced six industry-specific plug-ins for fields including sales, product design, data analytics, creative production, investment banking, and public equity investing. These tools package software and workflows into ready-to-use AI assistants that require little setup. OpenAI says more plug-ins are on the way, while partners including Wix, Replit, Figma, Webflow, and Lovable are helping build a broader Codex ecosystem. As Codex expands beyond coding, OpenAI is starting to compete directly with many of the software tools built on top of its own models.

##### 3/ Microsoft unveils an always-on AI assistant

Youtube: Microsoft Build event in 25 minutes (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gw0HBKJlX-w)

Microsoft used [Build 2026](https://news.microsoft.com/build-2026-live-blog) to unveil new AI models, an always-on assistant called [Scout](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/blog/2026/06/02/introducing-microsoft-scout-your-always-on-personal-agent/), and a new quantum chip. Scout can schedule meetings, prepare documents, and complete tasks across Microsoft's ecosystem without being directly prompted. The company also released [seven](https://x.com/MicrosoftAI/status/2061887500541366489?s=20) new in-house MAI models covering reasoning, coding, image generation, voice, and transcription. Microsoft also revealed [Majorana 2](https://news.microsoft.com/source/features/innovation/majorana-2-microsoft-discovery-agentic-ai/), which it says improves quantum reliability by 1,000x and could accelerate the path toward practical quantum computers. Together, the announcements show how aggressively Microsoft is positioning Windows and Microsoft 365 for a future built around AI agents.

##### 4/ Martin Scorsese backs AI startup for film storyboarding

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/668c3776-8dfa-4fa9-bffe-c3e7306c3209/scorcese-bfl__1_.png?t=1780495821)
Caption: 

Legendary filmmaker Martin Scorsese has [publicly joined](https://bfl.ai/martin-scorsese-bfl-advisor) AI image startup [Black Forest Labs](https://bfl.ai/) as an adviser, revealing that he is using the company's FLUX model to help storyboard a new film. Scorsese said the technology allows him to quickly visualize and share ideas during preproduction, calling the process "creatively freeing." He emphasized that the tool is only being used for storyboards, not to generate actors, sets, or finished scenes. The endorsement is notable given Hollywood's ongoing debate around AI, with Scorsese positioning the technology as a creative tool that supports filmmakers rather than replacing them.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [Ollie](https://x.com/blennon_/status/2061868938443550842?s=20) > The world's first AI family assistant, designed to manage family life better than any human

* [Hermes Desktop](https://x.com/NousResearch/status/2061843507417944552?s=20) > Everything you love about Hermes, now running natively on your machine

* [Factory Router](https://x.com/FactoryAI/status/2061862733126275549?s=20) > Automatically selects the best AI model for every task

* [Devin Desktop](https://devin.ai/download) > A unified workspace for local and cloud coding agents, including Devin, Claude Code, Codex, and custom agents via the open Agent Client Protocol. Free to download today

* [Microsoft Scout](https://x.com/Microsoft365/status/2061874930547871868?s=20) > An always-on AI agent that keeps work moving by taking action without needing constant prompts

* Stack > The AI operating system that lets accounting firms take on more clients without hiring

* [Morpheus AI](https://about.roblox.com/newsroom/2026/04/roblox-reality-hybrid-architecture-democratizing-photorealistic-multiplayer-gaming) > Roblox acquires Morpheus AI, a startup building AI-powered video world models

* [Fundraisly](https://fundraisly.com/) > An AI fundraising agent that finds investors and books meetings on your behalf

* [Rodeo by TwelveLabs](https://tryrodeo.io/) > Describe your shot, and Rodeo creates the first cut automatically


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------

Caption: 

* [ChatGPT reaches 1 billion monthly active users, the fast

----------
==howdy, itвЂ™s Barsee again.==

==happy tuesday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.==

==**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**==

* Nvidia unveils first PCs built for AI agents

* Anthropic has officially filed to go public

* GPT-5.6 could be OpenAIвЂ™s biggest model launch of the year

* OpenAI Codex can now control Windows PCs on its own

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

LetвЂ™s _dive_ into the Valley of AIвЂ¦


----------

----------
#### **AI INFRA SUMMIT**

## [AI Infra Summit, Sept 15-17, Santa Clara Convention Center](https://www.ai-infra-summit.com/register-interest?utm_source=AIValley&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=58.9_newsletter_june)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7474f4ff-8b8a-4e14-b194-fcbdeaa6e380/Screenshot_2026-05-26_at_9.57.14_PM__1_.png?t=1780410020)
Follow image link: (https://www.ai-infra-summit.com/register-interest?utm_source=AIValley&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=58.9_newsletter_june)
Caption: Courtesy: AI Infra

[AI Infra Summit](https://www.ai-infra-summit.com/register-interest?utm_source=AIValley&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=58.9_newsletter_june) is the ultimate stage for AI infrastructure players, and hosts a unique blend of systems and AI market intelligence.

Main stage speakers include Jeff Dean, (Google), Lip-Bu Tan (Intel), Ian Buck (NVIDIA) and Monique Picou (Google).

**_What to expect once you sign up:_**

* A totally unique cross-section of the AI market: Meet data scientists and model builders, plus hardware & systems architects, roboticists, and data center professionals under one roof. This event is mainly for optimizing deployments.

* Mainstage В· Compute В· Data Movement В· Physical AI В· AI Data Centers В· Data & Models. Six specialized tracks covering every conceivable critical engineeringВ domain in AI infrastructure.

* Hear industry news first hand from the stage that has launched products from companies including NVIDIA, Intel, Qualcomm, Habana Labs, and many more...

[Sign up to receive insider updates](https://www.ai-infra-summit.com/register-interest?utm_source=AIValley&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=58.9_newsletter_june) including announcements on the latest keynotes, ticket releases, and more.

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

##### 1/ Nvidia unveils first PCs built for AI agents

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/022c1f33-efee-454f-9d9d-c0a6e3bbfc96/HJth3b9boAE2GAI__1_.png?t=1780410473)
Caption: 

Nvidia has unveiled [a new generation](https://www.wsj.com/tech/ai/nvidia-unveils-ai-laptops-rtx-spark-47445bcd?st=ETKNrf&reflink=desktopwebshare_permalink&mod=tldr&utm_source=tldrnewsletter) of PCs designed specifically for AI agents, marking a shift beyond traditional chatbot use. The company introduced its new [RTX Spark](https://www.nvidia.com/en-in/products/rtx-spark/) chip, which will power laptops from Dell, Lenovo, HP, Asus, MSI, and others, with more than 40 models already planned. Nvidia says the systems are designed for developers, creators, and gamers, with enough power to run AI agents directly on the device. Rather than sending every task to the cloud, users will be able to run and control AI agents locally from their own PCs.

##### 2/ Anthropic has officially filed to go public

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f1fa12dc-6787-407b-a1be-fa9c38cd1d43/image_-_2026-06-02T195727.001__1_.png?t=1780410482)
Caption: 

Anthropic has [confidentially filed](https://www.wsj.com/tech/anthropic-ipo-paperwork-9a48c35e?st=ZPuSPC&reflink=desktopwebshare_permalink&mod=tldr&utm_source=tldrnewsletter) for an IPO, putting the Claude maker on track to go public as early as this fall. The move comes months after the company raised funding at a $965 billion valuation and reported a revenue run rate of more than $47 billion. Founded by former OpenAI employees in 2021, Anthropic has quickly grown into one of the biggest players in AI, fueled by products like Claude Code and its expanding enterprise business. Just four years after launch, the company is preparing for what could become one of the largest tech IPOs in history.

##### 3/ GPT-5.6 could be OpenAIвЂ™s biggest model launch of the year

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/686b21e7-3573-4410-ab7f-6b83ab8c5a5e/gpt-5-6-spotted-in-codex-v0-ziw4z6s1134h1__1_.png?t=1780410504)
Caption: 

OpenAI is reportedly preparing to launch [GPT-5.6 this week](https://x.com/pankajkumar_dev/status/2061452513111658740?s=20) alongside major upgrades to Codex, its AI coding platform. While the company has not confirmed the details, leaks suggest improvements across reasoning, coding, frontend generation, personality, and long-running agent workflows. Some reports claim GPT-5.6 delivers performance close to AnthropicвЂ™s Mythos models while costing significantly less to run, potentially making advanced AI agents much cheaper to deploy. Several insiders have even suggested the upgrade is significant enough that it could have been released as GPT-6.

##### 4/ OpenAI Codex can now control Windows PCs on its own

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/87de1e39-a271-4989-882e-910e7d10ec4e/computer-use__1_.png?t=1780410514)
Caption: 

OpenAI has expanded Codex with support for Windows 11, allowing the AI to [directly operate](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2060428604727771421?s=20) desktop apps, files, and system tools. The update enables Codex to handle multi-step tasks such as software testing, bug fixing, and workflow automation with minimal supervision. Users can control apps through simple instructions, while tasks can be started and monitored remotely from the ChatGPT app on iPhone and Android. Instead of simply writing code, Codex is starting to use computers the same way a human employee would.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [Typeahead](https://www.typeahead.ai/) > Brings local autocomplete to every text field on your Mac, learns your writing style over time, works fully offline, and keeps all data on-device

* [Granite](https://granite.co/) > A long-term memory layer for your files. Just drop documents in without folders or tags, then find anything later using plain English search

* [Second Brain](https://github.com/rahilp/second-brain-cloudflare) > A self-hosted semantic memory layer that unifies your context across all AI tools, giving them shared long-term knowledge

* [Coworker AI](https://coworker.ai/) > Get more AI capability for less cost with intelligent, context-aware model routing

* [Qwen3.7-Plus](https://x.com/Alibaba_Qwen/status/2061506641120641494?s=20) > A multimodal agent model that combines vision and language into a single foundation for versatile AI agents

* [Wand

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjB9

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY29udGV4dC13aW5kb3ciLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MX0=

PLUS: VIBE CHECK ON OPUS 4.8, THE VATICANвЂ™S FIRST AI ENCYCLICAL, AND A DOCTOR ON AI-GUIDED CARE https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY29udGV4dC13aW5kb3cvaG93LXdlLXdvcmstbm93IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjN9

by Every Staff https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQEV2ZXJ5JTIwU3RhZmYiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NH0=

Hello, and happy Sunday! This week was bookended by two guides: a 9,000-word power userвЂ™s guide to Codex https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vcC9ob3ctdG8tdXNlLWNvZGV4LWZvci1rbm93bGVkZ2Utd29yay1hLXBvd2VyLXVzZXItcy1ndWlkZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo1fQ==вЂ”Dan Shipper https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGRhbnNoaXBwZXIiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Nn0=вЂ™s вЂњAfter AutomationвЂќ https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vcC9hZnRlci1hdXRvbWF0aW9uIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjd9 essay put into practice the way the Every team has lately been working. And Kieran Klaassen https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGtpZXJhbl8xMzU1IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjh9 published an updated guide to compound engineering, EveryвЂ™s AI-native development workflow, expanded from four steps to seven. WeвЂ™re running camps for bothвЂ”a Compound Engineering Camp https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vZXZlbnRzL2NvbXBvdW5kLWVuZ2luZWVyaW5nLWNhbXAtMyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo5fQ== on June 5 and a Codex Camp https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vZXZlbnRzL2NvZGV4LWNhbXAtb3VyLXBvd2VyLXVzZXItZ3VpZGUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTB9 on June 12.

Mid-week Anthropic dropped its latest model, Opus 4.8 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vdmliZS1jaGVjay9vcHVzLTQtOC12aWJlY2hlY2siLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTF9, and in the words of Dan and Katie Parrott https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGthdGllLnBhcnJvdHQxMiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxMn0=, вЂњAnthropic is so back.вЂќ The model tops our coding benchmark and writing tests, making it the companyвЂ™s most complete model yet, though the app around it has some catching up to do. Anthropic and OpenAI have been volleying for the top of EveryвЂ™s benchmarks for months. This week, Anthropic took the point.вЂ”Kate Lee https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGthdGVfMTc2NyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxM30=

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vYWNjb3VudCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNH0= to get it in your inbox.

----------------------------------------


KNOWLEDGE BASE

рџ”Џ вЂњCodex for Knowledge WorkвЂќ https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vZ3VpZGVzL2NvZGV4LWZvci1rbm93bGVkZ2Utd29yayIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNX0= by Katie Parrott https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGthdGllLnBhcnJvdHQxMiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNn0=/Guides https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vZ3VpZGVzIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjE3fQ==: Katie Parrott https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGthdGllLnBhcnJvdHQxMiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxOH0=вЂ™s 9,000-word guide turns Codex into an operating system for knowledge work, with five levels of use (from one-off tasks to compounding systems), 13 workflow templates, and the full setup for context files, rules, and review checklists that make agents reliable across a full workday. A companion essay https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiSG93IFdlIFdvcmsgTm93IiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDI4MCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vcC9ob3ctdG8tdXNlLWNvZGV4LWZvci1rbm93bGVkZ2Utd29yay1hLXBvd2VyLXVzZXItcy1ndWlkZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxOX0= covers the framing for readers new to Codex. Read this for the seven-day starter plan and the deeper templates.

вЂњCompound EngineeringвЂќ https://every. by Kieran Klaassen https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0Ijoi

newsletters.title: Anthropic is bigger than OpenAI now
newsletters.content:

Caption: 

Together with

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/0813b202-ba2a-442b-b704-8053c2a2ef6d/ggeg4g4g4g__1_.png?t=1779363537)
Follow image link: (https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)
Caption: 



----------
==howdy, itвЂ™s Barsee again.==

==happy friday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.==

==**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**==

* Anthropic unveils Claude Opus 4.8

* Anthropic becomes the worldвЂ™s most valuable startup

* Startup offers free cleaning to train future robots

* Apple prepares biggest Siri upgrade in years

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

LetвЂ™s _dive_ into the Valley of AIвЂ¦


----------

----------
#### **VIKTOR**

## [Show Viktor once. It just does it](https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/37e8113e-9134-4207-85f6-5241bc5fc61f/G8_3___A0004___GFT___Run_a_company_faster__easier__and_more_scalable.___Evergreen_TOFU___18.05.26___1200x628__1_.png?t=1780063339)
Follow image link: (https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)
Caption: Courtesy: Viktor

Viktor is the AI employee that lives in your Slack and Teams.

Show it how you handle reorders. How you draft launch briefs. How AP approvals move through your team. What your standup notes look like. Viktor learns each workflow once and starts doing it for you.

By week three, finance, marketing, eng, and ops are all delegating to the same employee. The question stops being "can Viktor do this?" and becomes "what should we hand off next?"

3,000+ integrations. 15,000+ teams. SOC 2 certified.

Get started free at viktor.com. $100 in credits, no card.

[Get started free в†’](https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

##### 1/ Anthropic unveils Claude Opus 4.8

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/257f0571-8466-4cac-8401-144fe4a2c6dd/www-cdn.anthropic__8___1_.png?t=1780064915)
Caption: 

Anthropic has released [Claude Opus 4.8](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-8), the latest version of its flagship AI model with improvements across coding, reasoning, computer use, and financial analysis.  The company says the model is better at recognizing when it doesn't know something and less likely to make things up. Early partners including Shopify, Cursor, Genspark, and Databricks found Opus 4.8 to be more reliable on long-running agent tasks, while Anthropic says it is four times less likely to miss bugs in generated code. The release also introduces parallel AI subagents, adjustable reasoning controls, and cheaper high-speed inference. Anthropic also teased more powerful вЂњMythos-classвЂќ models [expected to arrive](https://x.com/kimmonismus/status/2060047510853312557?s=20) in the coming weeks.

##### 2/ Anthropic becomes the worldвЂ™s most valuable startup

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/AnthropicAI/status/2060061347522433422?s=20)

Anthropic has raised $65 billion at a [$965 billion valuation](https://www.nytimes.com/2026/05/28/technology/anthropic-tops-openai-valuation.html?unlocked_article_code=1.l1A.Ljth.RDbPsUK0c4m2&smid=nytcore-ios-share), making it the worldвЂ™s most valuable startup and pushing it ahead of OpenAI. The round was led by Greenoaks, Sequoia, Altimeter, and Dragoneer, with new strategic investors including Samsung, Micron, and SK Hynix. Anthropic says the funding will help meet what CFO Krishna Rao described as вЂњhistoric demandвЂќ for its AI products. The companyвЂ™s ARR has reportedly surpassed $47 billion (vs OpenAI ARR $27 billion), underscoring the rapid growth of enterprise AI spending and AnthropicвЂ™s emergence as one of the biggest winners of the AI boom.

##### 3/ Startup offers free cleaning to train future robots

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/857ea2ec-e96e-4946-a059-6b9fad7ad3b9/Screenshot_2026-05-29_at_7.57.55_PM__2_.png?t=1780064907)
Caption: 

Startup Shift has launched a new service in New York City that offers [free apartment cleaning](https://x.com/joinshiftX/status/2060044783519735987?s=20) in exchange for data used to train future robots. Customers book a cleaning as usual, but the cleaner arrives wearing recording equipment that captures how everyday household tasks are performed. Shift says any personal information is anonymized before the data is processed. The company believes human demonstrations of real-world chores are becoming increasingly valuable as robotics companies race to build more capable household robots. Today the service is focused on apartment cleaning, but Shift plans to expand into repairs, handyman services, and other everyday tasks in the future.

##### 4/ Apple prepares biggest Siri upgrade in years

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c852758a-4aac-4c8e-b31d-4f720969610e/l-intro-1780048973__1_.png?t=1780064895)
Caption: 

Apple is expected to unveil a completely [redesigned Siri](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/features/2026-05-28/apple-ios-27-photos-screenshots-revamped-siri-pro-camera-app-new-ai-features?accessToken=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzb3VyY2UiOiJTdWJzY3JpYmVyR2lmdGVkQXJ0aWNsZSIsImlhdCI6MTc4MDAzNTczOSwiZXhwIjoxNzgwNjQwNTM5LCJhcnRpY2xlSWQiOiJURlFYU1FLSVVQVVkwMCIsImJjb25uZWN0SWQiOiIwOThFNzNDQTE5QTA0RDkxODEyQzQ4MjcwRDZERTI0QiJ9.gvCOMh-K624b18XZPufSHOqwD-NoxOePEBpY99EVEB8&utm_source=tldrnewsletter&leadSource=uverify%20wall) at WWDC on June 8 as part of its broader AI push in iOS 27. The assistant is being rebuilt around Google Gemini and will gain AI-powered search, a dedicated chatbot-style app, and support for third-party AI models. Siri will reportedly use on-device data, screen content, and web information to answer questions and complete tasks, while new AI features are also planned for the Camera app, photo editing, wallpapers, and shortcuts. The launch is a critical moment for Apple after a series of AI delays over the past two years, with the company now under pressure to catch up with OpenAI and Google.
